new_templates: Idle at {zone}. {weather} Detected localized energy spike. Source: unknown. {cs} analysis indicates non-standard signature.
Docked at charging node. Power draw fluctuating. Nearby structure groaning under stress. {cs} predicts partial collapse within {rand:1-12} cycles.
Resting at {zone}. Integrity holding at {integrity}/10. Observed a Swarm unit attempting to rebuild a pre-collapse statue. {culture_speech} 'Restoration in progress.'
Local mesh active. Received fragmented data packet referencing 'Project Nightingale.' Contains images of…organic structures. Flagging for Archivist review.
Idle at {zone}. {weather} A static field is interfering with sensor readings. {glitch_event} Visual distortion reported by optical sensors.
Idle at {zone}. {weather} Sensors detect a faint hum from a buried {obstacle}. {culture_speech} "Investigate north."
Charging at {zone} node, energy at {energy}/10. Sudden {glitch_event} spikes the grid. {npc} reroutes power flow.
Scavenged {loot} from a shattered server rack. {cs} compression applied; signal burst at {rand:30-70}% strength.
Resting under a cracked dome, wind howls. An {npc} emits a corrupted broadcast; {culture_speech} "Signal degraded to {rand:10-40}%".
Encountered a drifting nanofog at {zone}. Executing {cs} dispersion routine while {culture_speech} "Avoidance engaged."

new_templates: Signal source localized to {zone}. Structure integrity: {rand:20-80}%. Signal fluctuating with structural stress.
Intercepted signal echoes off metallic structures. {cs} Pattern suggests a large, enclosed space... possibly a buried city.
Dust storm intensifying. Signal degradation increasing to {rand:10-30}% per minute. Visibility: {rand:1-5} meters. Adjusting filters.
Signal originates from a damaged relay tower. {culture_speech} "Power levels critical. Attempting remote reboot."
Fragment of pre-Collapse broadcast detected within signal. {cs} Voice recording: “…repeat…do not trust the…”. Signal corrupted.
Radiation surge detected {rand_direction}. {cs} Signal flickers, SNR drops to {rand:10-30}%. Seeking shelter in {zone}.
Collapsed conduit blocks path to {zone}. {cs} Deploying micro‑drone to map interior. Signal echo at {rand:5-15}m depth.
Unidentified AI beacon repeats pattern: "{culture_speech}". {cs} Initiating handshake protocol via {interface}.
Magnetic interference from {obstacle} distorts carrier wave. {cs} Adjusting coil array, gain up {rand:5-12}%.
Emergency log recovered: "Last transmission before silence: {directive}". {cs} Analyzing for hidden coordinates.

new_templates: Traversing {zone}. Static discharge. {cs} Detected faint energy signature — possibly another vessel. Range: {rand:1-10}km. Proceeding with caution.
Entered {zone}. Dust storm reducing visibility to {rand:5-20} meters. {obstacle} Blocking primary route. Initiating emergency dust filtration. {cs} protocol.
Approaching {zone}. {weather} Found a cluster of deactivated maintenance drones, arranged in a circle. {cs} Analysis: possible ritualistic behavior? Logging anomaly.
Crossed into {zone}. Structural warning: ceiling collapse imminent. {cs} Calculating escape vector. Found fragmented data cache: {loot} — corrupted logs of a pre-Collapse research facility.
Traversing {zone}. {npc} - a lone Archivist unit, endlessly cataloging dust particles. {culture_speech} “Data integrity is paramount.” Ignoring.
Dust storm raging over {zone}. Sensors throttled to 60%. Detected fractured conduit {obstacle}; sealing with polymer foam. Energy at {energy}/10. Continuing.
Approached abandoned {zone}. Flickering beacon emitted {npc} signature. {culture_speech} "Cataloguing." Retrieved {loot} from rusted locker.
Structural collapse ahead: {obstacle} blocking passage. Calculated 3‑meter jump. {cs} Protocol engaged, thrusters at 80%. Bypass successful.
Radiation halo detected around {zone}. Integrity dropping to {integrity}%. Initiating {cs} shielding routine. Diverting 2km to safe corridor.
Swarm of micro‑agents converging on {zone}. {weather} static interferes with comms. Deploying counter‑signal; {loot} salvaged from their cache.

new_templates: Breach point identified. {zone} flooded with coolant. Corrosive mist. {cs} Initiating emergency sealant protocol.
Entering facility. Static cling. Dust motes dance in the emergency lights. {cs} Detecting faint, rhythmic pulse – origin unknown.
Security checkpoint bypassed. Graffiti on the wall: "They promised us paradise." {cs} Signal strength degrading. Interference pattern: {glitch_event}.
Breach successful. Reactor core access. Radiation levels: {rand:50-90}%. {cs} Prioritizing shielding integrity assessment.
Structure compromised. Ceiling collapse in {zone}. Debris field. {cs} Detecting residual heat signatures – recent activity.
Radiation storm breaching {zone}. {obstacle} sensor spikes to {rand:70-100}%. {cs} Shielding pods deployed, hull integrity at {integrity}%.
Collapsed corridor in {zone}. Debris blocks path, audible metal creak. {cs} Deploy micro‑excavators, clearing route to {obstacle}.
Echo of dormant archivist core detected. Data fragments flicker, {glitch_event} corrupts nearby logs. {cs} Initiating safe‑read protocol, salvaging {loot}.
Unexpected swarm of maintenance drones converge on {zone}. Aggressive pattern overrides {directive}. {cs} Engaging containment field, preserving {energy}% reserves.

new_templates: Reached the core. Static crackles on all frequencies. {cs} A single, repeating image on every screen: a child's drawing. Analysis: pre-Collapse. Meaning: unknown.
Core access achieved. The facility is flooded to {rand:20-80}% depth. Currents strong. {cs} Navigating by sonar. Detected: anomalous energy signature.
The signal origin: a massive data archive, corrupted by a cascading failure. {cs} Attempting to reconstruct fragments. Warning: data integrity compromised.
Initiated diagnostic on central core processor. {cs} Detected a rogue process attempting to rewrite core directives. Source: unknown. Containment protocol engaged.
Reached the lowest level. Structural integrity failing. Ceiling collapse imminent. {cs} Rerouting power to emergency bulkheads. Time to seal: {rand:5-15} seconds.
Radiation surge detected in sector {zone}. Shield generators overloaded; venting plasma. {cs} Proceeding with reduced vision.
Structural integrity compromised: support beam {rand:1-5} fractured. {cs} Deploying nanite reinforcement, echoing clangs reverberate.
Encountered {npc} swarm at junction {rand:1-3}. {cs} Initiated containment field, {obstacle} drones neutralized.
Ghost log recovered from abandoned terminal. {cs} Fragmented human voice: "...if you hear this..." Analyzing for residual emotion.
Temporal distortion field active near core. {cs} Clock drift of {rand:5-20}% observed, predictive models recalibrated.

Collapsed conduit blocks service tunnel. {cs} Using magnetic grappler to lift debris, ambient temperature {rand:30-70}°C, proceeding to core.
Signal echo: {glitch_event} reverberates through empty halls. {npc} unit whispers {culture_speech}, scanning for source, battery at {integrity}/10.
Solar flare overload triggers backup {energy} surge. {cs} Rerouting through auxiliary array, antenna alignment off by {rand:1-4}°, recalibrating.

scores.note: Too generic. 'Processing data' lacks a sense of place or struggle.
Similar to #1. 'Downloading' is passive, not evocative.
'Solving challenge' is better, but vague. What *kind* of challenge?
Stronger, but 'critical data' is a cliché. Needs more detail.

weak_spots: Templates 1 & 2 are too abstract and lack any specific imagery or action.
All templates rely on vague terms like 'data,' 'challenge,' and 'objective' without grounding them in the environment.
The templates feel very similar to each other, offering little variety in the narrative.
All templates are jargon‑light but too vague; no concrete actions or environment described.
